result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 28:     WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02' AND createddate <...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH owner_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        caseid__c,
        oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
        newvalue__c AS new_owner,
        createddate,
        field__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'ownerid'
),
normalized_changes AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        TRIM(REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) AS caseid__c,
        TRIM(REPLACE(old_owner, '#', '')) AS old_owner,
        TRIM(REPLACE(new_owner, '#', '')) AS new_owner,
        createddate
    FROM owner_changes
),
normalized_cases AS (
    SELECT
        TRIM(REPLACE(id, '#', '')) AS id,
        createddate,
        closeddate,
        TRIM(REPLACE(ownerid, '#', '')) AS ownerid
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02' AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
),
transfer_flags AS (
    SELECT
        c.id AS case_id,
        CASE WHEN COUNT(nc.id) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_transfer
    FROM normalized_cases c
    LEFT JOIN normalized_changes nc ON c.id = nc.caseid__c
    GROUP BY c.id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
    SELECT
        c.id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate,
        c.ownerid
    FROM normalized_cases c
    JOIN transfer_flags tf ON c.id = tf.case_id
    WHERE tf.has_transfer = 0 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
handle_times AS (
    SELECT
        ownerid AS agent_id,
        id AS case_id,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
    FROM non_transferred_cases
),
agent_case_counts AS (
    SELECT
        agent_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_cases
    FROM (
        SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(ownerid, '#', '')) AS agent_id, id AS case_id
        FROM normalized_cases
        UNION ALL
        SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(new_owner, '#', '')) AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id
        FROM normalized_changes
    ) all_agent_cases
    GROUP BY agent_id
),
qualified_agents AS (
    SELECT agent_id
    FROM agent_case_counts
    WHERE total_cases > 1
),
agent_avg_handle AS (
    SELECT
        h.agent_id,
        AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
    FROM handle_times h
    JOIN qualified_agents qa ON h.agent_id = qa.agent_id
    GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH owner_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        caseid__c,
        oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
        newvalue__c AS new_owner,
        createddate,
        field__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'ownerid'
),
normalized_changes AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        TRIM(REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) AS caseid__c,
        TRIM(REPLACE(old_owner, '#', '')) AS old_owner,
        TRIM(REPLACE(new_owner, '#', '')) AS new_owner,
        createddate
    FROM owner_changes
),
normalized_cases AS (
    SELECT
        TRIM(REPLACE(id, '#', '')) AS id,
        createddate,
        closeddate,
        TRIM(REPLACE(ownerid, '#', '')) AS ownerid
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02' AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
),
transfer_flags AS (
    SELECT
        c.id AS case_id,
        CASE WHEN COUNT(nc.id) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_transfer
    FROM normalized_cases c
    LEFT JOIN normalized_changes nc ON c.id = nc.caseid__c
    GROUP BY c.id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
    SELECT
        c.id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate,
        c.ownerid
    FROM normalized_cases c
    JOIN transfer_flags tf ON c.id = tf.case_id
    WHERE tf.has_transfer = 0 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
handle_times AS (
    SELECT
        ownerid AS agent_id,
        id AS case_id,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
    FROM non_transferred_cases
),
agent_case_counts AS (
    SELECT
        agent_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_cases
    FROM (
        SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(ownerid, '#', '')) AS agent_id, id AS case_id
        FROM normalized_cases
        UNION ALL
        SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(new_owner, '#', '')) AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id
        FROM normalized_changes
    ) all_agent_cases
    GROUP BY agent_id
),
qualified_agents AS (
    SELECT agent_id
    FROM agent_case_counts
    WHERE total_cases > 1
),
agent_avg_handle AS (
    SELECT
        h.agent_id,
        AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
    FROM handle_times h
    JOIN qualified_agents qa ON h.agent_id = qa.agent_id
    GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_changes AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        caseid__c,
        oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
        newvalue__c AS new_owner,
        createddate,
        field__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE LOWER(field__c) = 'ownerid'
),
normalized_changes AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        TRIM(REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) AS caseid__c,
        TRIM(REPLACE(old_owner, '#', '')) AS old_owner,
        TRIM(REPLACE(new_owner, '#', '')) AS new_owner,
        createddate
    FROM owner_changes
),
normalized_cases AS (
    SELECT
        TRIM(REPLACE(id, '#', '')) AS id,
        createddate::timestamp AS createddate,
        closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate,
        TRIM(REPLACE(ownerid, '#', '')) AS ownerid
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-03 00:00:00'
),
transfer_flags AS (
    SELECT
        c.id AS case_id,
        CASE WHEN COUNT(nc.id) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_transfer
    FROM normalized_cases c
    LEFT JOIN normalized_changes nc ON c.id = nc.caseid__c
    GROUP BY c.id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
    SELECT
        c.id,
        c.createddate,
        c.closeddate,
        c.ownerid
    FROM normalized_cases c
    JOIN transfer_flags tf ON c.id = tf.case_id
    WHERE tf.has_transfer = 0 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
),
handle_times AS (
    SELECT
        ownerid AS agent_id,
        id AS case_id,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
    FROM non_transferred_cases
),
agent_case_counts AS (
    SELECT
        agent_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_cases
    FROM (
        SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(ownerid, '#', '')) AS agent_id, id AS case_id
        FROM normalized_cases
        UNION ALL
        SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(new_owner, '#', '')) AS agent_id, caseid__c AS case_id
        FROM normalized_changes
    ) all_agent_cases
    GROUP BY agent_id
),
qualified_agents AS (
    SELECT agent_id
    FROM agent_case_counts
    WHERE total_cases > 1
),
agent_avg_handle AS (
    SELECT
        h.agent_id,
        AVG(h.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
    FROM handle_times h
    JOIN qualified_agents qa ON h.agent_id = qa.agent_id
    GROUP BY h.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
